parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value:
=You are a senior SOC analyst. Analyze this security alert and respond ONLY in valid JSON with these exact fields: threat_type, mitre_technique, confidence (0.0-1.0), risk_level (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), summary (max 2 sentences), recommended_action (block_ip/monitor/escalate), block_duration_hours (integer).

Alert data:
{{ $json.sanitized_log }}

Respond with JSON only, no other text.
